[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11010111 6
2 11111111 a
3 11111101 7
4 01101100 4
5 01111111 7
6 00110100 3
7 01101111 6
